applicability_notes: torch_pattern_source: call_site: query_states = ttnn.transpose(query_states, 0, 2); query_states = ttnn.transpose(query_states, 1, 2)  # [B,H,S,d] -> [S,B,H,d] layout swap for SDPA decode kernels; ttnn_replacement: x = ttnn.to_layout(x, ttnn.ROW_MAJOR_LAYOUT); x = ttnn.transpose(x, 0, 2); x = ttnn.transpose(x, 1, 2); x = ttnn.to_layout(x, ttnn.TILE_LAYOUT)
